questionHtml: The player kicks the ball again. It rolls along the ground without sliding with a horizontal velocity of 1.40 m s−1. The radius of the ball is 0.11 m. Calculate the angular velocity of the ball. State an appropriate SI unit for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
13 «rad» s-1✓


Unit must be seen for mark

Accept Hz

Accept 4 π «rad» s-1
